Shadowy Apparitions have a $s2% chance to spawn as Void Apparitions that release a $@spellname1264177 at their target and deal $s1% increased damage.
$@spellicon1264177 $@spellname1264177 $@spelldesc1264177

spell.name: Void Apparitions
spell.description:
Tentacle Slam has a $s1% chance to activate an effect from one of your Idols.
$@spellicon373310 $@spellname373310 Summons a Shadowfiend.
$@spellicon373280 $@spellname373280 Your target witnesses a nightmare or vision of N'Zoth.
$@spellicon373273 $@spellname373273 Summons a Thing From Beyond.
$@spellicon377349 $@spellname377349 Summons a Void Tendril or Void Lasher.

spell.name: Void Bolt
spell.description: Sends a bolt of pure void energy at your target, dealing $s1 Shadow damage.

spell.name: Priest Discipline 12.0 Class Set 2pc
spell.description: Flash Heal, Shadow Mend, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by $s1%.

spell.name: Priest Discipline 12.0 Class Set 4pc
spell.description: Atonements applied by Flash Heal and Power Word: Radiance last an additional $s1 sec.

spell.name: Priest Holy 12.0 Class Set 2pc
spell.description: Casting Benediction has a high chance to summon a Divine Image.

spell.name: Priest Holy 12.0 Class Set 4pc
spell.description: Divine Image lasts for an additional ${$s1/1000}.1 seconds and its healing and damage is increased by $s2%.

spell.name: Priest Shadow 12.0 Class Set 2pc
spell.description: Shadow Word: Madness damage increased by $s2% and Insanity cost reduced by ${$s1/-100}.

spell.name: Priest Shadow 12.0 Class Set 4pc
spell.description: Shadowy Apparitions and Void Apparitions damage increased by $s1%.

spell.name: Quickened Pulse
spell.description: Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage ${100*(1/(1+$m1/100)-1)}% more often.

spell.name: Touch of the Void
spell.description: Voidheart now persists for $s1 sec after Entropic Rift ends.

spell.name: Overwhelming Shadows
spell.description: $?c3[Void Torrent deals $s1% increased damage.][Mind Blast deals $s2% increased damage.]

spell.name: Energy Conservation
spell.description: Power Surge lasts an additional ${$s1/1000} sec.

spell.name: Focused Outburst
spell.description: $?c2[Prayer of Healing mana cost reduced by $s1% and its cast time is reduced by $s2%.][Void Volley damage increased by $s3% and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s4/-1000} sec.]

spell.name: Realized Potential
spell.description:
$?c2[Flash Heal healing increased by $s1%.
Healing spells and Smite have an additional $s2% chance to grant Surge of Light.][Shadow Word: Death damage increased by $s3% and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s4/-1000} sec.]

spell.name: Words of the Wise
spell.description: $?a137031&?a1246517[Holy Word: Serenity healing increased by $s1%.]?c2[Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify healing increased by $s1%.][Flash Heal, Plea, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by $s2%.]

spell.name: Prophet's Insight
spell.description: $?c2[Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by ${$s1/-1000} sec.][Atonement healing from Holy spells is increased by $s4%.]

spell.name: Unfolding Vision
spell.description: $?c2[When Prayer of Mending expires without healing, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses $s1 $Lstack:stacks; instead.][ When Power Word: Shield or Void Shield expires with absorption remaining, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses $s2% of its maximum absorb instead.]

spell.name: Invoked Nightmare
spell.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals $s1% increased damage.

spell.name: Maddening Tentacles
spell.description: Tentacle Slam afflicts your target with Shadow Word: Madness at $s1% effectiveness.

spell.name: Crushing Void
spell.description:
Tentacle Slam deals $s2% increased damage and Void Volley deals $s1% increased damage.
When Voidform ends, you can cast Void Volley $1279437U additional $Ltime:times; within $1279437d.

spell.name: Haunting Shadows
spell.description:
Shadowy Apparition damage increased by $s1%.
When Shadowy Apparitions deal damage, they extend the duration of your Shadow Word: Pain and Vampiric Touch on the target by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

spell.name: Crushing Void
spell.description: $@spelldesc1279354
